allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\(''xlsx''\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\(''./data/VETLOGY BACKUP 28 ENERO 2026.xlsx''\); console.log\(''Sheets:'', wb.SheetNames\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, { defval: null }\); console.log\(''Total rows:'', rows.length\); console.log\(''First row keys:'', Object.keys\(rows[0] || {}\)\); console.log\(''Sample row:'', JSON.stringify\(rows[0], null, 2\)\);")
